THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUIDO, MARIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 645 VELASCO AVE, SAN FRANCISCO $4,900.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,900.00, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFENDANT, MARIA GUIDO, CAN PRODUCE A RECEIPT FOR RENT PAID IN JULY, 1994, PLAINTIFF AGREES TO ACCEPT $4200 IN SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT.
